1. Website Technical Maintenance & SEO: (Commercial)

  • Website Platform Updates:Regularly update the Content Management System (CMS), plugins, themes, and other software components to the latest stable versions. Testing and deployment of updates in a staging environment before pushing to the live site. Backup the website database and files before updates.

  • Database Management:Regularly backup the website database. Optimize database performance. Address database related issues.

  • Content Updates and Revisions:Update existing website content as needed, including text, images, videos, and other media. Ensure content accuracy and consistency. Implement SEO best practices for content updates.

  • Image and Media Management:Optimize and upload images and videos for web use. Manage image and media libraries. Ensure all images and videos are properly tagged with alt text.
  • SEO Monitoring and Optimization:Monitor website search engine rankings and traffic. Implement on-page and off-page SEO strategies. Perform keyword research and analysis.
  • User Feedback and Support:Monitor website user feedback and address any issues or concerns. Provide basic website support to users.

  • Provide regular reports on website performance, security, and content updates.
  • Communicate with stakeholders regarding website maintenance activities and issues.

Deliverables:

  • Regular website maintenance reports.
  • Updated website content.
  • Optimized website performance.
  • Secure and functional website.

notes:
LMN E-Commerce Website

 

Phase 1: Project Setup and Backend Development

  1. Project Setup:Set up a new Laravel project. Configure the project environment (database, authentication, etc.). Install required dependencies (Laravel packages, Ziina payment gateway SDK).
  2. Backend Development: Product Management:Create a robust product management system to manage product information (name, description, price, images, categories, attributes, etc.). Implement features for adding, editing, and deleting products. Integrate product images and variants (e.g., size, color). Category and Attribute Management:Create a hierarchical category system to organize products. Implement attribute management to define product variations (e.g., size, color, material). User Management:Implement user registration, login, and profile management. Implement roles and permissions for different user types (admin, customer). Order Management:Develop a comprehensive order management system to track orders from placement to delivery. Implement features for order confirmation, payment processing, shipping, and tracking. Integrate with the Ziina payment gateway for secure payment processing. Inventory Management:Implement inventory tracking to monitor stock levels and manage low-stock alerts. CRM Integration:Develop a CRM system inspired by Shopify's backend, providing features like customer management, order history, and analytics.

Phase 2: Frontend Development

  1. Frontend Design and Development:Design and develop a user-friendly and visually appealing frontend using modern web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript). Implement a responsive design to ensure optimal user experience across different devices. Develop a seamless checkout process, including guest checkout and account creation. Implement a robust search and filtering system to help users find products easily. Create a visually appealing product page, showcasing product details, images, and customer reviews. Design and implement a user-friendly cart and checkout process.

Phase 3: Testing and Deployment

  1. Testing:Conduct thorough unit, integration, and functional testing to identify and fix bugs. Perform security testing to ensure the application is protected against vulnerabilities. Conduct performance testing to optimize the website's speed and responsiveness.
  2. Deployment:Deploy the website to a production server, ensuring optimal performance and security. Configure the server environment (web server, database server, etc.). Implement a deployment strategy to streamline the deployment process.
